# komodo_destroy_deployment (Action)

Stops and removes the container for the target deployment.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the deployment to destroy.

### Optional

- `signal` (String) Override the default termination signal (e.g. `SIGTERM`, `SIGINT`).
- `time` (Number) Override the default termination max time (seconds).
